title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 14 - 2017: Did Taxes

enrichment.summary: Kyle briefly recaps April 14th: a low-energy day spent doing taxes at his mom's house and working on a project pitch called 'dimensions.' He notes he was exhausted after four difficult days and didn't exercise.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: acknowledges it was boring and simple but made some progress on a side project

transcript.text: Hello Living in Boulder Vlog for yesterday April 14th. Right now it's 3 14 p.m. on April 15th. I didn't have the motivation to do the video before. I'm just kind of tired.
Yesterday, I just did taxes all day yesterday. I didn't exercise. But I was feeling like shit all day. I was wasted. I did four days in a row after being at the absolute bottom.

So, and so I just went to my mom's house and was hanging out trying to do taxes like we'd get stuck and then wait for a call. And then I was working on my dimensions pitch, the thing that I ditched a few days ago. So it's nice to do that, have that on the back burner.
So that's what I did yesterday. Pretty boring. Pretty simple day. And then I'll do today's vlog later on. Peace out. I don't have anything else to share.
